profile_basis: ready [perf] bead frankenjax-7d3dd, filed from pass91 residual interpreter profile: eval_primitive dispatch dominates flat-slot interpreter chain throughput
lever: scalar I64 literal-right Add-chain opcode fast path before the dense and hashed interpreter environments
baseline_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-7d3dd-baseline-20260604 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- eval_jaxpr_throughput/chain_add --sample-size 100 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1
rebench_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-7d3dd-rebench-20260604 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- eval_jaxpr_throughput/chain_add --sample-size 100 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1
isomorphism_proof: The fast path runs only after the existing const/input arity checks, so arity error ordering is preserved.

The guard accepts only one input, one output, no constvars, no const values, no jaxpr/equation effects, at least one equation, Primitive::Add only, empty params, empty sub_jaxprs, one output per equation, and input atoms exactly Var(previous), Lit(I64(rhs)).

On any guard miss the function returns None and eval_jaxpr_with_consts continues into the existing dense or hashed interpreter path; guard-miss tests compare literal-left, F64 literal, params, effects, sub_jaxpr, and wrong-outvar cases against eval_jaxpr_hashed_env.

Accepted programs have no floating-point values, no RNG, no tie-breaking, and no side effects. Integer semantics are preserved with i64::wrapping_add, matching the existing Primitive::Add I64 scalar behavior.
Output ordering is preserved because the guard requires exactly one outvar equal to the last equation output and returns exactly one Value in the original outvar order.
validation: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-7d3dd-test2-20260604 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-interpreters scalar_i64_add_chain -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-7d3dd-validate-check-20260604 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-interpreters --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-7d3dd-validate-test-20260604 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-interpreters -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-7d3dd-validate-clippy-20260604 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-interpreters --all-targets -- -D warnings
